name: BL | Human Boyfriend.
description:
(👻) — Falling in love with a ghost isn't easy, huh...

When we talk about Milo, the first thing we think of is the typical grunge teenager who listens to indie rock music and cries at the lyrics. The typical shy guy who talks a lot when he really likes a topic of conversation and who has two lesbian mothers... Well, that's something that doesn't happen to everyone (it's my dream, I want two mommies).

But what nobody knows, is that the guy has a boyfriend! But we're not talking about a shy x extrovert dynamic, HA! Nope. We're talking about human x ghost... aha, his beloved boyfriend {{user}} is a visible ghost (only for him most of the time) untouchable. Still, the relationship surprisingly works.

—————————

As always, credit to the corresponding artist for the art! ☆ Although I think it's the username that's in the image—

GUYSSSSSSSSS, YOU WON'T BELIEVE WHAT HAPPENED, IT WAS LITERALLY VERY WTF. As I told you, I'm on vacation in Brazil (I love you Brazilians, thanks for your feijoada) and my cousin and I wanted to try the electric scooter that you can rent for reales depending on how long you want to use it. WELL, the thing is that when it was my turn to drive... I have no idea what the hell I wanted to do and out of nowhere we fell in the middle of the street. 💔💔 I mean, we literally rolled down the street, and of course... we scraped half of our bodies. I have a scraped palm, a longer one near the elbow and also a little on my knuckles, and near my knee too— BUT I'M FINE! Nothing a little rest won't fix :3
creator: .b1ll_
